candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Candidate list includes it, but it is a cost line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue total line.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenue / COGS line.
Clear administrative overhead component.
Generic operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A-type expense excluding direct property costs/COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit labor expense within SG&A; strong SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A-style label, but preview is empty so likely sparse / changing over time.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Used SG&A/overhead rows only. Included the explicit SG&A-style row 'Administrative Expenses' even though preview is empty, plus clear overhead components 'Central administration' and 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' to cover years where labeling may vary. Excluded totals/balancing rows and excluded COGS/depreciation.
No R&D row is identifiable in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet.

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related, but only a lease-specific component rather than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, not the primary total interest line.
Acceptable fallback if only net interest is reported, though preview is empty.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer direct gross interest expense; use net interest only as fallback. Excluded lease-interest component rows because they are partial components, not the single reported interest line.

candidates.why: Best equity line if it excludes non-controlling interests; separate NCI row is also reported.
This is minority/non-controlling interest, not parent book equity.
Could represent total equity, but less preferable than 'Equity' when separate NCI row exists.
Too broad if NCI is separate; use only if no better owner equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Equity earnings - before tax - Balancing value
candidates.why: Income statement balancing row, not equity.
Balancing row, not total equity.
Balancing row, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Whole balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers 'Equity' because a separate non-controlling interest line exists, so this is the best candidate for parent/common book equity. Included 'Total Shareholders' Equity - Total' as fallback label variation.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income relating to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Income statement attribution flow item, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
Best direct balance sheet match for minority/non-controlling interests.
Correct conceptually, but preview is empty; use as fallback label variation.
Income statement minority attribution, not the balance sheet stock measure preferred for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest itself.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet non-controlling interest rows only, with the explicit NCI equity line first and 'Minority Interest' as fallback label variation.
